description_long: This coatrack features a minimalist, arched frame constructed from slender metal rods, forming a tall, open structure. The arch is supported by two parallel vertical legs, each reinforced with horizontal crossbars for stability. The design is entirely open, with no solid panels or decorative embellishments, emphasizing functionality and simplicity. The metal rods are uniformly cylindrical and finished in a dark, likely powder-coated color, giving the object a modern, industrial appearance. There are no visible hooks or pegs for hanging items, suggesting it may serve as a frame for hanging garments on hangers or for supporting climbing plants in an urban garden context. The overall structure is lightweight and freestanding, suitable for placement in entryways, parks, or public spaces.
description: A tall, arched metal coatrack with a minimalist, open-frame design and no visible hooks or decorative elements. Its sleek, dark finish and simple construction make it suitable for modern urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full arched frame and both vertical legs, highlighting the open, unobstructed design.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the arch and the horizontal crossbars connecting the legs, emphasizing the frame's structural support.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the arch and vertical supports without any additional features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the arch's profile and the arrangement of crossbars.
